name: atto
description: A local-first, open-source tool for applicants' to track and customize job applications.

scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:frontend
scripts.preview: npm run preview:frontend && npm run preview:backend
scripts.build:pypi: npm run build:frontend && rm -rf atto/frontend-dist && mkdir -p atto/frontend-dist && cp -R frontend/dist/. atto/frontend-dist/ && npm run build:python
scripts.dist: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:exe
scripts.test:pypi-build: npm run build:pypi && python -m pip install --force-reinstall dist/atto_app-$npm_package_version-py3-none-any.whl && atto
